## Summary
- What changed?
- Why this change is needed?

## Scope
- [ ] Backend (`server.js`, `routes/`, `utils/`)
- [ ] Frontend (`client/src/`)
- [ ] Database (`db/`, `migrations/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`*.md`)
- [ ] MCP integration (`mcp-servers/`, `.vscode/settings.json`)

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run build` (frontend)
- [ ] Relevant API route smoke test
- [ ] No new broken Markdown links in touched files
- [ ] Updated docs for behavior/config changes

## Risks
- Any user-facing risk or rollback notes.

## Deployment Notes
- PM2 / migration / environment variable changes, if any.

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Error handling and logs included for new logic
- [ ] Screenshots attached for UI changes (if applicable)
